title: tragacantha rumelica
intro: Tragacantha rumelica, also known as Astragalus rumelicus, is a plant species belonging to the legume family and is commonly found in the Balkan Peninsula. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Tragacantha rumelica include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and improve respiratory health. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion by boiling the roots and leaves in water, or as a tincture, to utilize its medicinal properties.
